title: PairingResult
description: Result of a Pairing attempt for one Device and one Runtime.

session_id.description: Durable Session ID for session.resume on /ripdock/app when this trusted Runtime is chat-ready.

runtimeMetadata.description: Runtime-owned display metadata. MUST be present only when trustState is trusted.

runtimeAgents.description: Enabled, App-visible Agent definitions. MUST be present only when trustState is trusted.
